hero.heading: From Theory to Practice - With IT Seminars to Better Grades
hero.description: We help students apply IT practically - with our Learn by Doing approach in seminars that take place twice weekly.

meta.title: Kodschul Students - IT Training for Students | Kodschul
meta.description: Specialized IT and AI training programs for students. Hands-on learning, certification, and networking opportunities.
meta.keywords: IT training for students, student coding, programming courses, university IT, tech skills, academic AI training

partner_unis.title: Partner Universities
partner_unis.description: We collaborate with leading universities to provide specialized IT and AI training.

why_kodschul.title: Why Kodschul Students?
why_kodschul.description:
We believe in giving you more than just theoretical knowledge - our focus is on practical, real-world skills that you can apply immediately. You'll work with industry-experienced mentors who will help you overcome challenges and refine your skills.
With our only 99 € per month program, you'll get:
why_kodschul.benefit_1: Unlimited practical coaching in small, personalized groups.
why_kodschul.benefit_2: More than just theory - practical, hands-on skills you can apply immediately.
why_kodschul.benefit_3: Guidance from industry-experienced mentors who help you overcome challenges.
why_kodschul.benefit_4: Access to a network of working students that helps you build professional connections and advance your career.

feedback.heading: 77% of our students actively advance their studies and digital future!
feedback.description: Learn coding in a practical way, gather real skills, and launch into the digital future - with expert mentoring and appropriate training alongside your studies.

testimonials.title: What Our Students Say
testimonials.description: Hear from students who have transformed their learning experience with our practical approach to IT education.

stories.testimonial: The practical focus of Kodschul's Python training helped me complete my semester project with confidence. The mentors were always available to answer questions and provide guidance when I needed it most.

I went from struggling with basic HTML to building full-stack applications in just a few months. The small group setting makes it easy to get personalized help, and the practical exercises match what's needed in the industry.

As a Computer Science student, I found that Kodschul's AI courses complemented my university studies perfectly. They focus on implementation rather than just theory, which has been invaluable for my research projects.

benefits.subtitle: Boost your studies & your digital future!

items.title: Discover new skills
items.description: Dive into cutting-edge topics in IT, software development, and artificial intelligence. Learn the latest technologies and frameworks that are in demand in the industry. Numerous learning opportunities await you!

items.title: Gain recognized certificates
items.description: Earn a certificate for each course you complete and enhance your career path. The certificates are recognized in the industry and help you boost your career prospects. An additional qualification for your resume!

items.title: Learn from experts
items.description: Enhance your skills with experienced tutors and personal mentoring. Our experts have years of experience in the industry and share their knowledge and insights with you. Benefit from their extensive expertise!
